title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple rebuilt Siri at WWDC 2026 with personal context, screen awareness, and cross-device integration powered by Google Gemini. Despite the upgrade, investor reaction was cold, shares fell after the keynote, and the EU will not get it at launch, raising questions about whether Apple is leading in AI or repackaging competitors' technology.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 overhaul of Siri, which adds personal context, screen awareness, and cross-device integration, with the underlying intelligence supplied by Google Gemini. It matters because it positions Apple as a partner consuming a competitor's model rather than fielding its own, prompting questions about whether the company leads in AI or repackages others' technology. Key takeaways: investor reaction was cold and shares fell after the keynote, and the EU will not receive the upgrade at launch.
